en: Who's your friend who likes to play, bing, bop, bing, bop?
Who's the best in every way, and wants to sing the song the same?
Who's the rock that makes you yell, my friend? Who's the best in every way, and wants to sing the song the same?
Come on! Who's the rock that makes you yell, my friend?
Who's the rock that makes you yell, bing, bop, bing, bop? Who's the rock that makes you yell, my friend?
